policy: Only high-value Epstein public-record developments may surface on the homepage, and only for a limited time. Alerts must have a source route, evidence class, checked date, and expiry date.

alerts.title: Epstein Watch: Maxwell files new challenge; prosecutors oppose
alerts.summary: A new Reuters-reported Maxwell habeas filing tied to released Epstein materials is now tracked as a court-process update. This is litigation movement, not a finding that the claims are true.
